Get to know me

About Me

I’m an Associate Project Manager and Business Analyst with 3+ years of experience across Automotive CRM, EdTech, and SaaS product domains. I love the space where business strategy meets product execution — making sure both teams and clients get exactly what they need.

Proficient in Agile/Scrum methodologies, sprint lifecycle management, stakeholder engagement, and QA oversight. I’ve had the privilege of leading high-visibility product launches and coordinating cross-functional teams for US-based enterprise clients.

Based in Jaipur, Rajasthan · Immediately available for remote opportunities.

Agile / ScrumSprint PlanningStakeholder ManagementJIRAUS ClientsRemote Ready

My Proposal

I designed the entire WhatsApp notification journey for SIP

When working on the Sales Interaction Platform for Maruti Suzuki, I proposed and independently mapped this event-based WhatsApp notification flow in Figma — covering every trigger, decision node, and customer response from vehicle booking all the way through delivery confirmation.

Working with AI

AI Tools I Use Daily

I actively integrate AI into my workflow as a PM and BA — from research and writing to prototyping and data interpretation.

🤖
Claude
Writing and Communication

Drafts emails, summaries, PRDs, and client-facing documents. Turns rough notes into polished, professional communication.

🔍
Perplexity AI
Research and Analysis

Used for rapid research on industry trends, competitor analysis, and technical concepts during discovery and planning phases.

📧
Jason AI
Email and Sales Outreach

Automates personalised email sequences and sales pitches, helping craft targeted outreach for stakeholder and client engagement.

📝
Notion AI
Note-taking and Documentation

Organises meeting notes, action items, and project documentation — auto-summarises long discussions into structured takeaways.

📊
Rows AI
Data Interpretation

Analyses project metrics, sprint velocity, and client data directly in spreadsheets with AI-generated insights and visualisations.

🗺️
Eraser.io
Flowcharts and Diagrams

Creates clean technical diagrams, user flows, and system architecture visuals — ideal for communicating complex processes to stakeholders.

✨
Lovable
UI Prototyping

Generates functional UI prototypes and wireframe-ready designs rapidly, bridging the gap between requirement specs and visual output.

🎯
Gamma AI
Presentations and Decks

Transforms structured content into visually compelling presentations — used for sprint reviews, client demos, and stakeholder briefings.
